_comment: PLACEHOLDER DATA — generated in Phase 4 with null prices. The Phase 6 build script (/scripts/build.js) will replace this file at build time with real CoinGecko historical BTC/USD prices for each May 22, multiplied by the era's USD/VND rate. Until then, the Pizza Day returns table renders a 'data pending' state. The runtime BitcoinVN live price (pizza-price.js) does NOT depend on this file.
_source: Generated by Phase 4 scaffold. Will be replaced by /scripts/build.js fetching https://api.coingecko.com/api/v3/coins/bitcoin/history?date=22-05-YYYY
_unit: VND per 1 BTC, converted via the era's USD/VND mid rate
